description: Refactor the 'buildObservationSegment' method in 'src/main/java/com/medilog/export/HL7MessageBuilder.java' within the 'MediLogExport' project to improve performance by replacing inefficient String concatenation with 'java.lang.StringBuilder'. Ensure the output format remains identical and verify the refactoring by running the existing 'HL7MessageBuilderTest.java' JUnit tests.
